title: Calibrate governance complexity budget for project calibration plan
outOfScope: 任何生产功能或测试行为变更

sources.reason: Current confirmed complexity budgets and repayment-record format.
Complexity-policy and Work Item lifecycle requirements.
The authorized plan PR that measured markdownLines=8913 and archiveGrowth=428 in CI.

riskAssessment.reason: The change adjusts only confirmed repository governance budgets to admit the already archived plan evidence; no product behavior changes.

agentCapability.blockedReason: No blocking capability limitation; the Work Item is limited to governance YAML and evidence updates.

executionDecision.reason: User explicitly authorized an independent budget-remediation Work Item and PR.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The confirmed governance complexity policy admits the measured project-calibration plan values without changing product behavior.
Each increased budget has a repayment record naming the planned cleanup responsibility and measured target.
The policy and Work Item evidence pass all declared AI and project quality checks.
The resulting PR is limited to this budget-remediation Work Item and is independently reviewable.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: PR #214 cannot pass the repository's confirmed complexity gate because archiving the authorized execution-plan Work Item raises markdownLines from 8679 to 8913 and archiveGrowth from 427 to 428.
constraints: Change only the confirmed governance complexity budget and its repayment evidence.
Do not alter the execution plan or begin Work Item 1.
Preserve one Work Item, one branch, and one PR for this remediation.
intent.rationale: A separate, auditable budget-remediation Work Item keeps the archived plan evidence immutable while allowing its PR to be verified and merged through the normal lifecycle.

rawUserRequest: 授权创建一个独立的预算修复 Work Item/PR；再继续，仍不会启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Calibrate the confirmed governance complexity budget so the authorized project-calibration plan PR can pass its repository gates.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The measured project-calibration plan values exceed the current confirmed markdown and archive budgets.
evidence: PR #214 CI: python-platform-matrix and template-smoke failures

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Both budget increases carry explicit repayment records and do not start Work Item 1.
No production behavior, execution-plan content, or tests are changed by this remediation.
evidence: Contract outOfScope and final PR diff

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the independent governance budget-remediation Work Item and PR.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
